lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy a Skillcape of Firemaking?

lines.speaker: Ignatius Vulcan
lines.text: Of course you can. You are already a master of fire, you just need the cape to prove it. The cape is so bright that wearing it will light up dark caves. That'll be 99000 coins, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, that's too much.

lines.speaker: Ignatius Vulcan
lines.text: Sorry to hear that, I'll be here if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, that seems reasonable.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But, unfortunately, I don't have enough money with me.

lines.speaker: Ignatius Vulcan
lines.text: Well, come back and see me when you do.

lines.speaker: Ignatius Vulcan
lines.text: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.

lines.speaker: Ignatius Vulcan
lines.text: I'm sure you'll look hot in that cape.

lines.speaker: Ignatius Vulcan
lines.text: Can I help you at all?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Ignatius Vulcan
lines.text: My name is Ignatius Vulcan. Once I was - like you - an adventurer, but that was before I realised the beauty and power of flame! Just look at this...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeeouch!

lines.speaker: Ignatius Vulcan
lines.text: Stare into the flame and witness the purity and power of fire! As my attraction to flame grew, so did my skills at firelighting. I began to neglect my combat skills, my Mining skills and my questing. Who needs such

lines.speaker: Ignatius Vulcan
lines.text: mundane skills when one can harness the power of fire? After years of practice I am now the acknowledged Master of Flame! Everything must be purified by fire!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okaaaay! Err, I'll be going now. Umm, get better soon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is that cape you're wearing?

lines.speaker: Ignatius Vulcan
lines.text: This is a Skillcape of Firemaking, so bright that wearing it lights up caves! I was given it in recognition of my skill as the greatest firemaker in the lands! I AM the Master of Flame!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, I'll be going now. Keep a sharp look out for those men with their white jackets!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thanks.

lines.speaker: Ignatius Vulcan
lines.text: Okay, keep the fire burning.

sections.title: With a firemaking cape but no hood

lines.speaker: Ignatius Vulcan
lines.text: Can I help you at all?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I have another hood for my cape, please?

lines.speaker: Ignatius Vulcan
lines.text: You don't appear to have enough space in your inventory, come back and see me when you do.

lines.speaker: Ignatius Vulcan
lines.text: Most certainly, and free of charge!
